base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_butterfly_goei_idle — a character (boss) from 1981 galaga. Red 'Goei' butterfly mid-tier enemy — 2-frame wing-flap. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Red 'Goei' butterfly mid-tier enemy — 2-frame wing-flap; 16 per stage (middle 2 rows in formation); 1 HP. Dives in pairs with a Boss to form 'escort dive'
